candidate_definitions.text: Unofficial pytorch implementation of 'Arbitrary Style Transfer in Real-time with Adaptive Instance Normalization' [Huang+, ICCV2017]
This is an unofficial pytorch implementation of a paper, Arbitrary Style Transfer in Real-time with Adaptive Instance Normalization [Huang+, ICCV2017].
Code to create Stylized-ImageNet, a stylized version of standard ImageNet (ICLR 2019 Oral)

Interested to see how well your model copes with challenging stylized images? Check out the comprehensive toolbox at [bethgelab:model-vs-human](https://github.com/bethgelab/model-vs-human), which supports stylized data (complete with human comparison data) and comes with code to…
